name: Unipres Corporation
summary: Unipres Corporation manufactures and sells automotive parts in Japan, the Americas, Europe, and Asia. The company provides car body parts, such as front side members, front pillars, side sills, center pillars, rear side members, side roof rails, filler tubes, steering members, fuel tank parts, and parts that support collision and handling safety of automobiles. It also offers precision press technology products, including torque converters, clutch packs, clutch drums, driven plate/retaining plates, oil pans, piston plungers, carrier packs, carrier plate/bases, and end plates. In addition, the company provides plastic press technology products comprising front under covers, front fender protectors, floor under covers, and trunk trims. Further, it engages in the manufacture and sale of electric machinery parts; metal products; and welders, dies, jigs, and tools, as well as inspection and maintenance of press machinery. Unipres Corporation was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
